description_long: This internet cafe is a compact, enclosed room featuring dark blue carpeting and light gray walls. The interior includes a wooden bunk bed with a desk underneath, a brown sofa, a wooden cabinet adorned with stickers, and a computer station with a monitor and chair. The entrance is marked by a wooden door, and a large window with multiple panes is set into one wall, allowing visibility into the space. A yellow caution-style floor mat is visible near the entrance, adding a touch of urban character. The overall layout is functional and cozy, with furniture arranged to maximize the use of limited space.
description: A small, enclosed internet cafe room with a bunk bed, computer station, sofa, and cabinet, featuring blue carpet and wooden furnishings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the interior with the open wooden door, brown sofa, bunk bed, computer station, and cabinet with stickers clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the windowed wall, the computer station, and the arrangement of the furniture, with the door and cabinet also in view.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the exterior gray wall with only the top of the door and cabinet barely visible, obscuring the interior details.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the exterior gray wall with minimal features visible, only the tops of the door and cabinet peeking over the wall.
attribute_signage: A yellow caution-style floor mat with black text and graphics is visible near the entrance; no exterior signage is present.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: One computer station with a monitor and chair is visible inside, positioned near the window and desk area.
